basis.runtime_boundary: Executed from Codex App outside tmux with App-safe OMX spine; an accidental omx-api invocation failed before doing task work and is not counted as a successful CLI runtime proof.

routing.app_only: Can inspect docs and run scripts, but routing discipline depends on the current agent remembering the lab conventions.
routing.omx_assisted: Mode contract names surface, OMX level, entry command, artifacts, verification path, and stop condition.
evidence: scripts/workflow-mode omx-long-horizon prints omx_level: CLI runtime

auditability.app_only: Chat transcript can explain decisions but is weaker as a durable audit record.
auditability.omx_assisted: Workspace artifacts capture report, validation commands, structured matrix, and progress handoff.
evidence: validation.md records exact commands and evidence snippets

runtime_execution.app_only: Sufficient for this bounded read-only proof and local file generation.
runtime_execution.omx_assisted: Would add stronger durable runtime state if launched through omx-api or ./scripts/start-api-relay with an attached/compatible terminal surface.
runtime_execution.gap: This run validated the CLI-runtime contract but did not complete inside attached CLI OMX runtime.
evidence: Current execution surface was Codex App outside tmux
Accidental omx-api invocation failed with no prompt/non-TTY before task execution
scripts/workflow-mode omx-long-horizon declares the intended CLI runtime entry

parallelism.app_only: No independent parallel slice was necessary for the bounded script-and-artifact task.
parallelism.omx_assisted: Could help if future proof includes separate reviewers or longer-running checks, but was not needed here.
evidence: Required checks were short sequential commands
No multi-agent conflicts or long-running tasks were present

handoff_quality.app_only: A final chat summary is useful but less restartable.
handoff_quality.omx_assisted: Progress, validation, report, and JSON matrix make App or CLI resume auditable.
evidence: progress.md updated with final status and next audit action

net_value.verdict: OMX adds value mainly through explicit mode routing, durable artifacts, validation discipline, and handoff quality. For this bounded read-only task, actual runtime-execution value is not proven because the run did not complete inside attached CLI OMX runtime.
net_value.recommended_follow_up: Run the same proof from omx-api or ./scripts/start-api-relay in an attached/compatible CLI surface when the task boundary permits its green-light and lane-guard side effects, then compare artifacts against this App-safe run.
